positive: A whimsical and stylish design featuring a group of stylized celestial elements—a crescent moon, three twinkling stars of varying sizes, and a stylized cluster of constellations—intertwined with blooming, symmetrical botanicals like lavender and forget-me-nots. The composition is perfectly circular and centered, creating a strong, clean silhouette against a solid background. The style should be inspired by vintage engraving mixed with modern flat illustration, using deep indigo blues, matte golds, mint greens, and creamy off-white. Emphasize crisp lines, high contrast, and a sense of gentle magic. Vector art, clean edges, highly detailed line work, suitable for screen printing or embroidery. Minimalist, elegant, symmetry, perfect repeat pattern.
negative: text, letters, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, messy, blurry, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, ugly, low detail, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, jpeg artifacts
